tEn: Momentum Contrast for Unsupervised Visual Representation Learning
tZh: 动量对比：用于无监督视觉表示学习
sEn: MoCo enables building a large and consistent dynamic dictionary for contrastive learning, achieving competitive results and even surpassing supervised pre-training in downstream tasks.
sZh: MoCo通过队列和移动平均编码器构建大型一致的动态字典，在对比学习中取得竞争性结果，甚至在下游任务中超越监督预训练。
absEn: We present Momentum Contrast (MoCo) for unsupervised visual representation learning. From a perspective on contrastive learning as dictionary look-up, we build a dynamic dictionary with a queue and a moving-averaged encoder. This enables building a large and consistent dictionary on-the-fly that facilitates contrastive unsupervised learning. MoCo provides competitive results under the common linear protocol on ImageNet classification. More importantly, the representations learned by MoCo transfer well to downstream tasks. MoCo can outperform its supervised pre-training counterpart in 7 detection/segmentation tasks on PASCAL VOC, COCO, and other datasets, sometimes surpassing it by large margins. This suggests that the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning has been largely closed in many vision tasks.
absZh: 我们提出了用于无监督视觉表示学习的动量对比（MoCo）。从对比学习作为字典查找的角度出发，我们利用队列和移动平均编码器构建了一个动态字典。这使得能够即时构建一个大型且一致的字典，从而促进对比无监督学习。MoCo在ImageNet分类的常见线性协议下提供了有竞争力的结果。更重要的是，MoCo学习到的表示能够很好地迁移到下游任务中。在PASCAL VOC、COCO及其他数据集上的7个检测/分割任务中，MoCo可以超越其监督预训练对应方法，有时甚至大幅领先。这表明在许多视觉任务中，无监督和监督表示学习之间的差距已基本被弥合。

contrib.en: Proposes Momentum Contrast (MoCo) for unsupervised visual representation learning.
contrib.zh: 提出动量对比（MoCo）用于无监督视觉表示学习。

contrib.en: Builds a dynamic dictionary with a queue and a momentum-updated encoder for contrastive learning.
contrib.zh: 构建包含队列和动量更新编码器的动态字典，用于对比学习。

contrib.en: Achieves competitive results on ImageNet linear classification and outperforms supervised pre-training on 7 detection/segmentation tasks.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet线性分类上取得有竞争力的结果，并在7个检测/分割任务上超越有监督预训练。

contrib.en: Introduces shuffled batch normalization to prevent cheating in contrastive learning.
contrib.zh: 引入打乱批归一化以防止对比学习中的作弊行为。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that MoCo scales to billion-image datasets and closes the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning.
contrib.zh: 证明MoCo可扩展到十亿图像数据集，并缩小了无监督与有监督表示学习之间的差距。

limits.en: MoCo's improvement from ImageNet to Instagram-1B is relatively small, suggesting limited exploitation of larger-scale data.
limits.zh: MoCo从ImageNet到Instagram-1B的提升相对较小，表明对更大规模数据的利用有限。

limits.en: The pretext task is simple instance discrimination; more advanced pretext tasks may further improve performance.
limits.zh: 预文本任务为简单的实例判别；更高级的预文本任务可能进一步提升性能。

limits.en: MoCo lags behind supervised pre-training on VOC semantic segmentation, indicating task-specific limitations.
limits.zh: MoCo在VOC语义分割上落后于有监督预训练，表明存在任务特定的局限性。

limits.en: The method requires careful tuning of momentum coefficient and dictionary size for optimal performance.
limits.zh: 该方法需要仔细调整动量系数和字典大小以获得最佳性能。

items.en: We present Momentum Contrast (MoCo) for unsupervised visual representation learning. From a perspective on contrastive learning [29] as dictionary look-up, we build a dynamic dictionary with a queue and a moving-averaged encoder. This enables building a large and consistent dictionary on-the-fly that facilitates contrastive unsupervised learning. MoCo provides competitive results under the common linear protocol on ImageNet classification. More importantly, the representations learned by MoCo transfer well to downstream tasks. MoCo can outperform its supervised pre-training counterpart in 7 detection/segmentation tasks on PASCAL VOC, COCO, and other datasets, sometimes surpassing it by large margins. This suggests that the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning has been largely closed in many vision tasks.
items.zh: 我们提出了用于无监督视觉表征学习的动量对比（MoCo）。从对比学习[29]作为字典查找的角度出发，我们构建了一个带有队列和移动平均编码器的动态字典。这使得能够即时构建一个大型且一致的字典，从而促进对比无监督学习。MoCo在ImageNet分类的常见线性协议下提供了有竞争力的结果。更重要的是，MoCo学习到的表征能够很好地迁移到下游任务中。在PASCAL VOC、COCO和其他数据集的7个检测/分割任务中，MoCo可以超越其有监督预训练的对应方法，有时甚至大幅领先。这表明在许多视觉任务中，无监督和有监督表征学习之间的差距已基本被弥合。

items.en: Unsupervised representation learning is highly successful in natural language processing, e.g., as shown by GPT [50, 51] and BERT [12]. But supervised pre-training is still dominant in computer vision, where unsupervised methods generally lag behind. The reason may stem from differences in their respective signal spaces. Language tasks have discrete signal spaces (words, sub-word units, etc.) for building tokenized dictionaries, on which unsupervised learning can be based. Computer vision, in contrast, further concerns dictionary building [54, 9, 5], as the raw signal is in a continuous, high-dimensional space and is not structured for human communication (e.g., unlike words).
items.zh: 无监督表征学习在自然语言处理中非常成功，例如GPT[50,51]和BERT[12]所示。但在计算机视觉中，有监督预训练仍然占主导地位，无监督方法通常落后。原因可能在于它们各自信号空间的差异。语言任务具有离散的信号空间（单词、子词单元等），用于构建可标记化的字典，无监督学习可以基于此进行。相比之下，计算机视觉进一步关注字典构建[54,9,5]，因为原始信号处于连续的高维空间，并且没有为人类通信而结构化（例如，不像单词）。

items.en: Several recent studies [61, 46, 36, 66, 35, 56, 2] present promising results on unsupervised visual representation learning using approaches related to the contrastive loss [29]. Though driven by various motivations, these methods can be thought of as building dynamic dictionaries. The “keys” (tokens) in the dictionary are sampled from data (e.g., images or patches) and are represented by an encoder network. Unsupervised learning trains encoders to perform dictionary look-up: an encoded “query” should be similar to its matching key and dissimilar to others. Learning is formulated as minimizing a contrastive loss [29].
items.zh: 最近的几项研究[61,46,36,66,35,56,2]展示了使用与对比损失[29]相关的方法进行无监督视觉表征学习的有希望的结果。尽管动机各异，但这些方法可以被视为构建动态字典。字典中的“键”（标记）从数据（例如图像或补丁）中采样，并由编码器网络表示。无监督学习训练编码器执行字典查找：编码后的“查询”应与其匹配键相似，而与其他键不相似。学习被表述为最小化对比损失[29]。

items.en: From this perspective, we hypothesize that it is desirable to build dictionaries that are: (i) large and (ii) consistent as they evolve during training. Intuitively, a larger dictionary may better sample the underlying continuous, high-dimensional visual space, while the keys in the dictionary should be represented by the same or similar encoder so that their comparisons to the query are consistent. However, existing methods that use contrastive losses can be limited in one of these two aspects (discussed later in context).
items.zh: 从这个角度来看，我们假设构建字典的理想特性是：（i）大型且（ii）在训练过程中保持一致。直观上，更大的字典可以更好地采样底层的连续高维视觉空间，而字典中的键应由相同或相似的编码器表示，以确保它们与查询的比较是一致的。然而，现有使用对比损失的方法可能在这两个方面之一受到限制（稍后在上下文中讨论）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Momentum Contrast (MoCo) trains a visual representation encoder by matching an encoded query q𝑞q to a dictionary of encoded keys using a contrastive loss. The dictionary keys {k0,k1,k2,…}subscript𝑘0subscript𝑘1subscript𝑘2…\{k_{0},k_{1},k_{2},...\} are defined on-the-fly by a set of data samples. The dictionary is built as a queue, with the current mini-batch enqueued and the oldest mini-batch dequeued, decoupling it from the mini-batch size. The keys are encoded by a slowly progressing encoder, driven by a momentum update with the query encoder. This method enables a large and consistent dictionary for learning visual representations.
items.capZh: 图1：动量对比（MoCo）通过使用对比损失将编码查询q与编码键的字典进行匹配来训练视觉表征编码器。字典键{k0,k1,k2,...}由一组数据样本即时定义。字典构建为一个队列，当前小批量入队，最旧的小批量出队，从而使其与小批量大小解耦。键由一个缓慢进展的编码器编码，该编码器通过查询编码器的动量更新驱动。该方法为学习视觉表征提供了一个大型且一致的字典。

items.en: We present Momentum Contrast (MoCo) as a way of building large and consistent dictionaries for unsupervised learning with a contrastive loss (Figure 1). We maintain the dictionary as a queue of data samples: the encoded representations of the current mini-batch are enqueued, and the oldest are dequeued. The queue decouples the dictionary size from the mini-batch size, allowing it to be large. Moreover, as the dictionary keys come from the preceding several mini-batches, a slowly progressing key encoder, implemented as a momentum-based moving average of the query encoder, is proposed to maintain consistency.
items.zh: 我们提出了动量对比（MoCo）作为一种使用对比损失构建大型且一致的字典进行无监督学习的方法（图1）。我们将字典维护为一个数据样本队列：当前小批量的编码表示入队，最旧的出队。队列将字典大小与小批量大小解耦，使其可以很大。此外，由于字典键来自前几个小批量，我们提出了一种缓慢进展的键编码器，实现为查询编码器的基于动量的移动平均，以保持一致性。

items.en: MoCo is a mechanism for building dynamic dictionaries for contrastive learning, and can be used with various pretext tasks. In this paper, we follow a simple instance discrimination task [61, 63, 2]: a query matches a key if they are encoded views (e.g., different crops) of the same image. Using this pretext task, MoCo shows competitive results under the common protocol of linear classification in the ImageNet dataset [11].
items.zh: MoCo是一种为对比学习构建动态字典的机制，可以与各种前置任务一起使用。在本文中，我们遵循一个简单的实例判别任务[61,63,2]：如果查询和键是同一图像的编码视图（例如，不同裁剪），则它们匹配。使用这个前置任务，MoCo在ImageNet数据集[11]的线性分类常见协议下展示了有竞争力的结果。

items.en: A main purpose of unsupervised learning is to pre-train representations (i.e., features) that can be transferred to downstream tasks by fine-tuning. We show that in 7 downstream tasks related to detection or segmentation, MoCo unsupervised pre-training can surpass its ImageNet supervised counterpart, in some cases by nontrivial margins. In these experiments, we explore MoCo pre-trained on ImageNet or on a one-billion Instagram image set, demonstrating that MoCo can work well in a more real-world, billion-image scale, and relatively uncurated scenario. These results show that MoCo largely closes the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning in many computer vision tasks, and can serve as an alternative to ImageNet supervised pre-training in several applications.
items.zh: 无监督学习的一个主要目的是预训练可以迁移到下游任务（通过微调）的表征（即特征）。我们表明，在7个与检测或分割相关的下游任务中，MoCo无监督预训练可以超越其ImageNet有监督对应方法，在某些情况下以非平凡的优势领先。在这些实验中，我们探索了在ImageNet或十亿Instagram图像集上预训练的MoCo，证明了MoCo在更真实、十亿图像规模且相对未整理的情景中也能很好地工作。这些结果表明，MoCo在很大程度上弥合了无监督和有监督表征学习在许多计算机视觉任务中的差距，并且可以在若干应用中作为ImageNet有监督预训练的替代方案。

items.en: Unsupervised/self-supervised111Self-supervised learning is a form of unsupervised learning. Their distinction is informal in the existing literature. In this paper, we use the more classical term of “unsupervised learning”, in the sense of “not supervised by human-annotated labels”. learning methods generally involve two aspects: pretext tasks and loss functions. The term “pretext” implies that the task being solved is not of genuine interest, but is solved only for the true purpose of learning a good data representation. Loss functions can often be investigated independently of pretext tasks. MoCo focuses on the loss function aspect. Next we discuss related studies with respect to these two aspects.
items.zh: 无监督/自监督¹学习通常涉及两个方面：前置任务和损失函数。术语“前置”意味着正在解决的任务并非真正感兴趣，而仅仅是为了学习良好数据表征的真正目的而解决。损失函数通常可以独立于前置任务进行研究。接下来，我们讨论与这两个方面相关的研究。

items.en: A common way of defining a loss function is to measure the difference between a model’s prediction and a fixed target, such as reconstructing the input pixels (e.g., auto-encoders) by L1 or L2 losses, or classifying the input into pre-defined categories (e.g., eight positions [13], color bins [64]) by cross-entropy or margin-based losses. Other alternatives, as described next, are also possible.
items.zh: 定义损失函数的一种常见方法是测量模型预测与固定目标之间的差异，例如通过L1或L2损失重建输入像素（例如，自编码器），或通过交叉熵或基于间隔的损失将输入分类为预定义类别（例如，八个位置[13]，颜色箱[64]）。其他替代方案也是可能的，如下所述。

items.en: Contrastive losses [29] measure the similarities of sample pairs in a representation space. Instead of matching an input to a fixed target, in contrastive loss formulations the target can vary on-the-fly during training and can be defined in terms of the data representation computed by a network [29]. Contrastive learning is at the core of several recent works on unsupervised learning [61, 46, 36, 66, 35, 56, 2], which we elaborate on later in context (Sec. 3.1).
items.zh: 对比损失[29]测量表示空间中样本对的相似性。与将输入匹配到固定目标不同，在对比损失公式中，目标可以在训练过程中动态变化，并且可以根据网络计算的数据表示来定义[29]。对比学习是最近几项无监督学习工作的核心[61,46,36,66,35,56,2]，我们将在上下文中详细阐述（第3.1节）。

items.en: Adversarial losses [24] measure the difference between probability distributions. It is a widely successful technique for unsupervised data generation. Adversarial methods for representation learning are explored in [15, 16]. There are relations (see [24]) between generative adversarial networks and noise-contrastive estimation (NCE) [28].
items.zh: 对抗损失[24]测量概率分布之间的差异。这是一种在无监督数据生成中广泛成功的技术。用于表征学习的对抗方法在[15,16]中进行了探索。生成对抗网络与噪声对比估计（NCE）[28]之间存在联系（参见[24]）。

items.en: A wide range of pretext tasks have been proposed. Examples include recovering the input under some corruption, e.g., denoising auto-encoders [58], context auto-encoders [48], or cross-channel auto-encoders (colorization) [64, 65]. Some pretext tasks form pseudo-labels by, e.g., transformations of a single (“exemplar”) image [17], patch orderings [13, 45], tracking [59] or segmenting objects [47] in videos, or clustering features [3, 4].
items.zh: 已经提出了广泛的前置任务。示例包括在某种损坏下恢复输入，例如去噪自编码器[58]、上下文自编码器[48]或跨通道自编码器（着色）[64,65]。一些前置任务通过例如单个（“示例”）图像的变换[17]、补丁排序[13,45]、视频中的跟踪[59]或对象分割[47]或特征聚类[3,4]来形成伪标签。

items.en: Various pretext tasks can be based on some form of contrastive loss functions. The instance discrimination method [61] is related to the exemplar-based task [17] and NCE [28]. The pretext task in contrastive predictive coding (CPC) [46] is a form of context auto-encoding [48], and in contrastive multiview coding (CMC) [56] it is related to colorization [64].
items.zh: 各种前置任务可以基于某种形式的对比损失函数。实例判别方法[61]与基于示例的任务[17]和NCE[28]相关。对比预测编码（CPC）[46]中的前置任务是上下文自编码[48]的一种形式，而对比多视图编码（CMC）[56]中的前置任务与着色[64]相关。

full.secZh: 3.1 对比学习作为字典查找

items.en: Contrastive learning [29], and its recent developments, can be thought of as training an encoder for a dictionary look-up task, as described next.
items.zh: 对比学习[29]及其最新发展可以被视为训练编码器执行字典查找任务，如下所述。

items.en: Consider an encoded query q𝑞q and a set of encoded samples {k0,k1,k2,…}subscript𝑘0subscript𝑘1subscript𝑘2…\{k_{0},k_{1},k_{2},...\} that are the keys of a dictionary. Assume that there is a single key (denoted as k+subscript𝑘k_{+}) in the dictionary that q𝑞q matches. A contrastive loss [29] is a function whose value is low when q𝑞q is similar to its positive key k+subscript𝑘k_{+} and dissimilar to all other keys (considered negative keys for q𝑞q). With similarity measured by dot product, a form of a contrastive loss function, called InfoNCE [46], is considered in this paper:
items.zh: 考虑一个编码查询q和一组编码样本{k0,k1,k2,...}，它们是字典的键。假设字典中有一个与q匹配的键（记为k+）。对比损失[29]是一个函数，当q与其正键k+相似且与所有其他键（视为q的负键）不相似时，其值较低。通过点积测量相似性，本文考虑了一种称为InfoNCE[46]的对比损失函数形式：

items.en: where τ𝜏\tau is a temperature hyper-parameter per [61]. The sum is over one positive and K𝐾K negative samples. Intuitively, this loss is the log loss of a (K+1)𝐾1({K}{+}1)-way softmax-based classifier that tries to classify q𝑞q as k+subscript𝑘k_{+}. Contrastive loss functions can also be based on other forms [29, 59, 61, 36], such as margin-based losses and variants of NCE losses.
items.zh: 其中τ是温度超参数，如[61]所述。求和是对一个正样本和K个负样本进行的。直观上，该损失是试图将q分类为k+的(K+1)路softmax分类器的对数损失。对比损失函数也可以基于其他形式[29,59,61,36]，例如基于间隔的损失和NCE损失的变体。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Conceptual comparison of three contrastive loss mechanisms (empirical comparisons are in Figure 3 and Table 3). Here we illustrate one pair of query and key. The three mechanisms differ in how the keys are maintained and how the key encoder is updated. (a): The encoders for computing the query and key representations are updated end-to-end by back-propagation (the two encoders can be different). (b): The key representations are sampled from a memory bank [61]. (c): MoCo encodes the new keys on-the-fly by a momentum-updated encoder, and maintains a queue (not illustrated in this figure) of keys.
items.capZh: 图2：三种对比损失机制的概念比较（实证比较见图3和表3）。这里我们说明一对查询和键。这三种机制在键的维护方式和键编码器的更新方式上有所不同。(a)：用于计算查询和键表示的编码器通过反向传播端到端更新（两个编码器可以不同）。(b)：键表示从记忆库[61]中采样。(c)：MoCo通过动量更新的编码器即时编码新键，并维护一个键队列（本图中未说明）。

items.en: The contrastive loss serves as an unsupervised objective function for training the encoder networks that represent the queries and keys [29]. In general, the query representation is q=fq​(xq)𝑞subscript𝑓qsuperscript𝑥𝑞q=f_{\textrm{q}}(x^{q}) where fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} is an encoder network and xqsuperscript𝑥𝑞x^{q} is a query sample (likewise, k=fk​(xk)𝑘subscript𝑓ksuperscript𝑥𝑘k=f_{\textrm{k}}(x^{k})). Their instantiations depend on the specific pretext task. The input xqsuperscript𝑥𝑞x^{q} and xksuperscript𝑥𝑘x^{k} can be images [29, 61, 63], patches [46], or context consisting a set of patches [46]. The networks fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} and fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}} can be identical [29, 59, 63], partially shared [46, 36, 2], or different [56].
items.zh: 对比损失作为无监督目标函数，用于训练表示查询和键的编码器网络[29]。通常，查询表示为q = f_q(x^q)，其中f_q是编码器网络，x^q是查询样本（类似地，k = f_k(x^k)）。它们的实例化取决于具体的前置任务。输入x^q和x^k可以是图像[29,61,63]、补丁[46]或由一组补丁组成的上下文[46]。网络f_q和f_k可以相同[29,59,63]、部分共享[46,36,2]或不同[56]。

items.en: From the above perspective, contrastive learning is a way of building a discrete dictionary on high-dimensional continuous inputs such as images. The dictionary is dynamic in the sense that the keys are randomly sampled, and that the key encoder evolves during training. Our hypothesis is that good features can be learned by a large dictionary that covers a rich set of negative samples, while the encoder for the dictionary keys is kept as consistent as possible despite its evolution. Based on this motivation, we present Momentum Contrast as described next.
items.zh: 从上述角度来看，对比学习是一种在高维连续输入（如图像）上构建离散字典的方法。该字典是动态的，因为键是随机采样的，并且键编码器在训练过程中不断演化。我们的假设是，通过一个覆盖丰富负样本的大字典可以学习到良好的特征，同时字典键的编码器应尽可能保持一致性，尽管它在演化。基于这一动机，我们提出了动量对比（Momentum Contrast），如下所述。

items.en: At the core of our approach is maintaining the dictionary as a queue of data samples. This allows us to reuse the encoded keys from the immediate preceding mini-batches. The introduction of a queue decouples the dictionary size from the mini-batch size. Our dictionary size can be much larger than a typical mini-batch size, and can be flexibly and independently set as a hyper-parameter.
items.zh: 我们方法的核心是将字典维护为一个数据样本的队列。这允许我们重用来自前几个小批量的编码键。引入队列将字典大小与小批量大小解耦。我们的字典大小可以远大于典型的小批量大小，并且可以灵活地独立设置为超参数。

items.en: The samples in the dictionary are progressively replaced. The current mini-batch is enqueued to the dictionary, and the oldest mini-batch in the queue is removed. The dictionary always represents a sampled subset of all data, while the extra computation of maintaining this dictionary is manageable. Moreover, removing the oldest mini-batch can be beneficial, because its encoded keys are the most outdated and thus the least consistent with the newest ones.
items.zh: 字典中的样本被逐步替换。当前小批量被加入队列，队列中最旧的小批量被移除。字典始终代表所有数据的一个采样子集，而维护该字典的额外计算量是可管理的。此外，移除最旧的小批量可能是有益的，因为其编码键是最过时的，因此与最新键的一致性最差。

items.en: Using a queue can make the dictionary large, but it also makes it intractable to update the key encoder by back-propagation (the gradient should propagate to all samples in the queue). A naïve solution is to copy the key encoder fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}} from the query encoder fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}}, ignoring this gradient. But this solution yields poor results in experiments (Sec. 4.1). We hypothesize that such failure is caused by the rapidly changing encoder that reduces the key representations’ consistency. We propose a momentum update to address this issue.
items.zh: 使用队列可以使字典变大，但也使得通过反向传播更新键编码器变得困难（梯度需要传播到队列中的所有样本）。一个简单的解决方案是直接从查询编码器 f_q 复制键编码器 f_k，忽略这个梯度。但该解决方案在实验中效果不佳（第 4.1 节）。我们假设这种失败是由于快速变化的编码器降低了键表示的一致性。我们提出动量更新来解决这个问题。

items.en: Formally, denoting the parameters of fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}} as θksubscript𝜃k\theta_{\textrm{k}} and those of fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} as θqsubscript𝜃q\theta_{\textrm{q}}, we update θksubscript𝜃k\theta_{\textrm{k}} by:
items.zh: 形式上，将 f_k 的参数记为 θ_k，f_q 的参数记为 θ_q，我们通过下式更新 θ_k：

items.en: Here m∈[0,1)𝑚01m\in[0,1) is a momentum coefficient. Only the parameters θqsubscript𝜃q\theta_{\textrm{q}} are updated by back-propagation. The momentum update in Eqn.(2) makes θksubscript𝜃k\theta_{\textrm{k}} evolve more smoothly than θqsubscript𝜃q\theta_{\textrm{q}}. As a result, though the keys in the queue are encoded by different encoders (in different mini-batches), the difference among these encoders can be made small. In experiments, a relatively large momentum (e.g., m𝑚m == 0.999, our default) works much better than a smaller value (e.g., m𝑚m == 0.90.90.9), suggesting that a slowly evolving key encoder is a core to making use of a queue.
items.zh: 这里 m ∈ [0,1) 是动量系数。只有参数 θ_q 通过反向传播更新。式 (2) 中的动量更新使 θ_k 比 θ_q 演化得更平滑。因此，尽管队列中的键由不同的编码器（在不同的小批量中）编码，但这些编码器之间的差异可以很小。在实验中，相对较大的动量（例如 m = 0.999，我们的默认值）比更小的值（例如 m = 0.9）效果更好，这表明缓慢演化的键编码器是利用队列的核心。

items.en: MoCo is a general mechanism for using contrastive losses. We compare it with two existing general mechanisms in Figure 2. They exhibit different properties on the dictionary size and consistency.
items.zh: MoCo 是使用对比损失的一般机制。我们在图 2 中将其与两种现有的一般机制进行比较。它们在字典大小和一致性方面表现出不同的特性。

items.en: The end-to-end update by back-propagation is a natural mechanism (e.g., [29, 46, 36, 63, 2, 35], Figure 2a). It uses samples in the current mini-batch as the dictionary, so the keys are consistently encoded (by the same set of encoder parameters). But the dictionary size is coupled with the mini-batch size, limited by the GPU memory size. It is also challenged by large mini-batch optimization [25]. Some recent methods [46, 36, 2] are based on pretext tasks driven by local positions, where the dictionary size can be made larger by multiple positions. But these pretext tasks may require special network designs such as patchifying the input [46] or customizing the receptive field size [2], which may complicate the transfer of these networks to downstream tasks.
items.zh: 通过反向传播的端到端更新是一种自然机制（例如 [29, 46, 36, 63, 2, 35]，图 2a）。它使用当前小批量中的样本作为字典，因此键被一致地编码（由同一组编码器参数）。但字典大小与小批量大小耦合，受限于 GPU 内存大小。它也会受到大批量优化的挑战 [25]。一些近期方法 [46, 36, 2] 基于由局部位置驱动的预文本任务，其中字典大小可以通过多个位置变大。但这些预文本任务可能需要特殊的网络设计，例如将输入分块 [46] 或定制感受野大小 [2]，这可能会使这些网络向下游任务的迁移复杂化。

items.en: Another mechanism is the memory bank approach proposed by [61] (Figure 2b). A memory bank consists of the representations of all samples in the dataset. The dictionary for each mini-batch is randomly sampled from the memory bank with no back-propagation, so it can support a large dictionary size. However, the representation of a sample in the memory bank was updated when it was last seen, so the sampled keys are essentially about the encoders at multiple different steps all over the past epoch and thus are less consistent. A momentum update is adopted on the memory bank in [61]. Its momentum update is on the representations of the same sample, not the encoder. This momentum update is irrelevant to our method, because MoCo does not keep track of every sample. Moreover, our method is more memory-efficient and can be trained on billion-scale data, which can be intractable for a memory bank.
items.zh: 另一种机制是 [61] 提出的记忆库方法（图 2b）。记忆库包含数据集中所有样本的表示。每个小批量的字典从记忆库中随机采样，不进行反向传播，因此可以支持大的字典大小。然而，记忆库中样本的表示是在上次看到时更新的，因此采样的键本质上对应于过去整个 epoch 中多个不同步骤的编码器，因此一致性较差。[61] 在记忆库上采用了动量更新。其动量更新是针对同一样本的表示，而不是编码器。这种动量更新与我们的方法无关，因为 MoCo 不跟踪每个样本。此外，我们的方法更节省内存，可以在十亿级数据上进行训练，而记忆库可能难以处理。

items.en: Sec. 4 empirically compares these three mechanisms.
items.zh: 第 4 节通过实验比较了这三种机制。

items.en: Contrastive learning can drive a variety of pretext tasks. As the focus of this paper is not on designing a new pretext task, we use a simple one mainly following the instance discrimination task in [61], to which some recent works [63, 2] are related.
items.zh: 对比学习可以驱动各种预文本任务。由于本文的重点不是设计新的预文本任务，我们使用一个简单的任务，主要遵循 [61] 中的实例判别任务，一些近期工作 [63, 2] 也与此相关。

items.en: Following [61], we consider a query and a key as a positive pair if they originate from the same image, and otherwise as a negative sample pair. Following [63, 2], we take two random “views” of the same image under random data augmentation to form a positive pair. The queries and keys are respectively encoded by their encoders, fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} and fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}}. The encoder can be any convolutional neural network [39].
items.zh: 遵循 [61]，如果查询和键来自同一图像，则视为正样本对，否则为负样本对。遵循 [63, 2]，我们在随机数据增强下对同一图像取两个随机“视图”以形成正样本对。查询和键分别由它们的编码器 f_q 和 f_k 编码。编码器可以是任何卷积神经网络 [39]。

items.en: Algorithm 1 provides the pseudo-code of MoCo for this pretext task. For the current mini-batch, we encode the queries and their corresponding keys, which form the positive sample pairs. The negative samples are from the queue.
items.zh: 算法 1 提供了 MoCo 用于此预文本任务的伪代码。对于当前小批量，我们编码查询及其对应的键，这些构成正样本对。负样本来自队列。

items.en: We adopt a ResNet [33] as the encoder, whose last fully-connected layer (after global average pooling) has a fixed-dimensional output (128-D [61]). This output vector is normalized by its L2-norm [61]. This is the representation of the query or key. The temperature τ𝜏\tau in Eqn.(1) is set as 0.07 [61]. The data augmentation setting follows [61]: a 224×\times224-pixel crop is taken from a randomly resized image, and then undergoes random color jittering, random horizontal flip, and random grayscale conversion, all available in PyTorch’s torchvision package.
items.zh: 我们采用 ResNet [33] 作为编码器，其最后一个全连接层（在全局平均池化之后）具有固定维度的输出（128-D [61]）。该输出向量通过其 L2 范数 [61] 进行归一化。这是查询或键的表示。式 (1) 中的温度 τ 设置为 0.07 [61]。数据增强设置遵循 [61]：从随机调整大小的图像中裁剪出 224×224 像素的块，然后进行随机颜色抖动、随机水平翻转和随机灰度转换，所有这些都在 PyTorch 的 torchvision 包中可用。

items.en: Our encoders fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} and fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}} both have Batch Normalization (BN) [37] as in the standard ResNet [33]. In experiments, we found that using BN prevents the model from learning good representations, as similarly reported in [35] (which avoids using BN). The model appears to “cheat” the pretext task and easily finds a low-loss solution. This is possibly because the intra-batch communication among samples (caused by BN) leaks information.
items.zh: 我们的编码器 f_q 和 f_k 都包含标准 ResNet [33] 中的批归一化（BN）[37]。在实验中，我们发现使用 BN 会阻止模型学习良好的表示，这与 [35] 中的报告类似（该文避免使用 BN）。模型似乎“欺骗”了预文本任务，并轻易找到了低损失解。这可能是由于样本间的批内通信（由 BN 引起）泄露了信息。

items.en: We resolve this problem by shuffling BN. We train with multiple GPUs and perform BN on the samples independently for each GPU (as done in common practice). For the key encoder fksubscript𝑓kf_{\textrm{k}}, we shuffle the sample order in the current mini-batch before distributing it among GPUs (and shuffle back after encoding); the sample order of the mini-batch for the query encoder fqsubscript𝑓qf_{\textrm{q}} is not altered. This ensures the batch statistics used to compute a query and its positive key come from two different subsets. This effectively tackles the cheating issue and allows training to benefit from BN.
items.zh: 我们通过打乱 BN 来解决这个问题。我们使用多个 GPU 进行训练，并独立地对每个 GPU 上的样本进行 BN（如常见做法）。对于键编码器 f_k，我们在将当前小批量分发到 GPU 之前打乱样本顺序（编码后再打乱回来）；查询编码器 f_q 的小批量样本顺序不变。这确保了用于计算查询及其正键的批统计量来自两个不同的子集。这有效地解决了作弊问题，并允许训练从 BN 中受益。

items.en: We use shuffled BN in both our method and its end-to-end ablation counterpart (Figure 2a). It is irrelevant to the memory bank counterpart (Figure 2b), which does not suffer from this issue because the positive keys are from different mini-batches in the past.
items.zh: 我们在我们的方法及其端到端消融对应方法（图 2a）中都使用了打乱 BN。这与记忆库对应方法（图 2b）无关，后者不会受到此问题的影响，因为正键来自过去的不同小批量。

items.en: We study unsupervised training performed in:
items.zh: 我们研究在以下数据集上进行的无监督训练：

items.en: ImageNet-1M (IN-1M): This is the ImageNet [11] training set that has ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim1.28 million images in 1000 classes (often called ImageNet-1K; we count the image number instead, as classes are not exploited by unsupervised learning). This dataset is well-balanced in its class distribution, and its images generally contain iconic view of objects.
items.zh: ImageNet-1M (IN-1M)：这是 ImageNet [11] 训练集，包含约 128 万张图像，共 1000 个类别（通常称为 ImageNet-1K；我们按图像数量计数，因为无监督学习不利用类别）。该数据集类别分布均衡，图像通常包含物体的标志性视图。

items.en: Instagram-1B (IG-1B): Following [44], this is a dataset of ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim1 billion (940M) public images from Instagram. The images are from ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim1500 hashtags [44] that are related to the ImageNet categories. This dataset is relatively uncurated comparing to IN-1M, and has a long-tailed, unbalanced distribution of real-world data. This dataset contains both iconic objects and scene-level images.
items.zh: Instagram-1B (IG-1B)：遵循 [44]，这是一个包含约 10 亿（9.4 亿）张 Instagram 公开图像的数据集。这些图像来自与 ImageNet 类别相关的约 1500 个标签 [44]。与 IN-1M 相比，该数据集相对未经整理，具有真实世界数据的长尾、不均衡分布。该数据集既包含标志性物体，也包含场景级图像。

items.en: We use SGD as our optimizer. The SGD weight decay is 0.0001 and the SGD momentum is 0.9. For IN-1M, we use a mini-batch size of 256 (N𝑁N in Algorithm 1) in 8 GPUs, and an initial learning rate of 0.03. We train for 200 epochs with the learning rate multiplied by 0.1 at 120 and 160 epochs [61], taking ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim53 hours training ResNet-50. For IG-1B, we use a mini-batch size of 1024 in 64 GPUs, and a learning rate of 0.12 which is exponentially decayed by 0.9×\times after every 62.5k iterations (64M images). We train for 1.25M iterations (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim1.4 epochs of IG-1B), taking ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim6 days for ResNet-50.
items.zh: 我们使用SGD作为优化器。SGD权重衰减为0.0001，SGD动量为0.9。对于IN-1M，我们在8个GPU上使用256的迷你批大小（算法1中的N），初始学习率为0.03。我们训练200个epoch，学习率在120和160个epoch时乘以0.1 [61]，训练ResNet-50大约需要53小时。对于IG-1B，我们在64个GPU上使用1024的迷你批大小，学习率为0.12，每62.5k次迭代（6400万张图像）后指数衰减0.9倍。我们训练125万次迭代（约1.4个IG-1B epoch），ResNet-50大约需要6天。

items.en: We first verify our method by linear classification on frozen features, following a common protocol. In this subsection we perform unsupervised pre-training on IN-1M. Then we freeze the features and train a supervised linear classifier (a fully-connected layer followed by softmax). We train this classifier on the global average pooling features of a ResNet, for 100 epochs. We report 1-crop, top-1 classification accuracy on the ImageNet validation set.
items.zh: 我们首先按照常见协议，通过冻结特征的线性分类来验证我们的方法。在本小节中，我们在IN-1M上进行无监督预训练。然后我们冻结特征并训练一个监督线性分类器（一个全连接层后接softmax）。我们在ResNet的全局平均池化特征上训练该分类器，共100个epoch。我们报告ImageNet验证集上的单裁剪top-1分类准确率。

items.en: For this classifier, we perform a grid search and find the optimal initial learning rate is 30 and weight decay is 0 (similarly reported in [56]). These hyper-parameters perform consistently well for all ablation entries presented in this subsection. These hyper-parameter values imply that the feature distributions (e.g., magnitudes) can be substantially different from those of ImageNet supervised training, an issue we will revisit in Sec. 4.2.
items.zh: 对于该分类器，我们进行网格搜索，发现最优初始学习率为30，权重衰减为0（[56]中也有类似报告）。这些超参数对本小节中呈现的所有消融条目表现一致良好。这些超参数值表明特征分布（例如，幅度）可能与ImageNet监督训练的特征分布有显著差异，我们将在第4.2节中重新讨论这个问题。

items.en: We compare the three mechanisms that are illustrated in Figure 2. To focus on the effect of contrastive loss mechanisms, we implement all of them in the same pretext task as described in Sec. 3.3. We also use the same form of InfoNCE as the contrastive loss function, Eqn.(1). As such, the comparison is solely on the three mechanisms.
items.zh: 我们比较了图2中说明的三种机制。为了聚焦于对比损失机制的效果，我们在第3.3节描述的相同前置任务中实现了所有机制。我们还使用相同形式的InfoNCE作为对比损失函数，即公式(1)。因此，比较仅针对这三种机制。

items.en: The results are in Figure 3. Overall, all three mechanisms benefit from a larger K𝐾K. A similar trend has been observed in [61, 56] under the memory bank mechanism, while here we show that this trend is more general and can be seen in all mechanisms. These results support our motivation of building a large dictionary.
items.zh: 结果如图3所示。总体而言，所有三种机制都受益于更大的K。在记忆库机制下，[61, 56]中已观察到类似趋势，而这里我们表明这种趋势更为普遍，可在所有机制中看到。这些结果支持了我们构建大型字典的动机。

items.en: The end-to-end mechanism performs similarly to MoCo when K𝐾K is small. However, the dictionary size is limited by the mini-batch size due to the end-to-end requirement. Here the largest mini-batch a high-end machine (8 Volta 32GB GPUs) can afford is 1024. More essentially, large mini-batch training is an open problem [25]: we found it necessary to use the linear learning rate scaling rule [25] here, without which the accuracy drops (by ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim2% with a 1024 mini-batch). But optimizing with a larger mini-batch is harder [25], and it is questionable whether the trend can be extrapolated into a larger K𝐾K even if memory is sufficient.
items.zh: 当K较小时，端到端机制的表现与MoCo相似。然而，由于端到端的要求，字典大小受到迷你批大小的限制。这里高端机器（8个Volta 32GB GPU）能承受的最大迷你批大小为1024。更本质的是，大迷你批训练是一个开放问题[25]：我们发现有必要在此使用线性学习率缩放规则[25]，否则准确率会下降（使用1024迷你批时下降约2%）。但使用更大的迷你批进行优化更困难[25]，即使内存充足，该趋势能否外推到更大的K也值得怀疑。

items.en: The memory bank [61] mechanism can support a larger dictionary size. But it is 2.6% worse than MoCo. This is inline with our hypothesis: the keys in the memory bank are from very different encoders all over the past epoch and they are not consistent. Note the memory bank result of 58.0% reflects our improved implementation of [61].222Here 58.0% is with InfoNCE and K𝐾K==65536. We reproduce 54.3% when using NCE and K𝐾K==4096 (the same as [61]), close to 54.0% in [61].
items.zh: 记忆库[61]机制可以支持更大的字典大小。但它比MoCo差2.6%。这与我们的假设一致：记忆库中的键来自过去整个epoch中非常不同的编码器，因此不一致。注意，58.0%的记忆库结果反映了我们对[61]的改进实现。222这里58.0%是使用InfoNCE且K==65536的结果。我们使用NCE且K==4096（与[61]相同）复现了54.3%，接近[61]中的54.0%。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparison of three contrastive loss mechanisms under the ImageNet linear classification protocol. We adopt the same pretext task (Sec. 3.3) and only vary the contrastive loss mechanism (Figure 2). The number of negatives is K𝐾K in memory bank and MoCo, and is K−1𝐾1K{-}1 in end-to-end (offset by one because the positive key is in the same mini-batch). The network is ResNet-50.
items.capZh: 图3：在ImageNet线性分类协议下三种对比损失机制的比较。我们采用相同的前置任务（第3.3节），仅改变对比损失机制（图2）。负样本数量在记忆库和MoCo中为K，在端到端中为K-1（因为正键在同一迷你批中，所以少一个）。网络为ResNet-50。

items.en: The table below shows ResNet-50 accuracy with different MoCo momentum values (m𝑚m in Eqn.(2)) used in pre-training (K𝐾K == 4096 here) :
items.zh: 下表显示了在预训练中使用不同MoCo动量值（公式(2)中的m）时ResNet-50的准确率（此处K==4096）：

items.en: It performs reasonably well when m𝑚m is in 0.99 ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim 0.9999, showing that a slowly progressing (i.e., relatively large momentum) key encoder is beneficial. When m𝑚m is too small (e.g., 0.9), the accuracy drops considerably; at the extreme of no momentum (m𝑚m is 0), the training loss oscillates and fails to converge. These results support our motivation of building a consistent dictionary.
items.zh: 当m在0.99到0.9999之间时，表现合理，表明缓慢进展（即相对较大的动量）的键编码器是有益的。当m过小（例如0.9）时，准确率显著下降；在无动量（m为0）的极端情况下，训练损失振荡且无法收敛。这些结果支持了我们构建一致字典的动机。

items.en: Previous unsupervised learning methods can differ substantially in model sizes. For a fair and comprehensive comparison, we report accuracy vs. #parameters333Parameters are of the feature extractor: e.g., we do not count the parameters of convxx{}_{\text{x}} if convxx{}_{\text{x}} is not included in linear classification. trade-offs. Besides ResNet-50 (R50) [33], we also report its variants that are 2×{2}{\times} and 4×{4}{\times} wider (more channels), following [38].444Our w2×{2}{\times} and w4×{4}{\times} models correspond to the “×\times8” and “×\times16” cases in [38], because the standard-sized ResNet is referred to as “×\times4” in [38]. We set K𝐾K == 65536 and m𝑚m == 0.999. Table 1 is the comparison.
items.zh: 先前的无监督学习方法在模型大小上可能有显著差异。为了公平和全面的比较，我们报告准确率与参数数量的权衡。333参数指特征提取器：例如，如果convx未包含在线性分类中，我们不计算其参数。除了ResNet-50 (R50) [33]，我们还报告其2倍和4倍宽度（更多通道）的变体，遵循[38]。444我们的w2倍和w4倍模型对应于[38]中的“×8”和“×16”情况，因为标准大小的ResNet在[38]中被称为“×4”。我们设置K==65536且m==0.999。表1为比较结果。

items.en: MoCo with R50 performs competitively and achieves 60.6% accuracy, better than all competitors of similar model sizes (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim24M). MoCo benefits from larger models and achieves 68.6% accuracy with R50w4×{4}{\times}.
items.zh: 使用R50的MoCo表现有竞争力，达到60.6%的准确率，优于所有类似模型大小（约24M）的竞争对手。MoCo受益于更大的模型，使用R50w4倍时达到68.6%的准确率。

items.en: Notably, we achieve competitive results using a standard ResNet-50 and require no specific architecture designs, e.g., patchified inputs [46, 35], carefully tailored receptive fields [2], or combining two networks [56]. By using an architecture that is not customized for the pretext task, it is easier to transfer features to a variety of visual tasks and make comparisons, studied in the next subsection.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，我们使用标准ResNet-50取得了有竞争力的结果，且不需要特定的架构设计，例如分块输入[46, 35]、精心调整的感受野[2]或结合两个网络[56]。通过使用未针对前置任务定制的架构，更容易将特征迁移到各种视觉任务并进行比较，这将在下一小节中研究。

items.en: This paper’s focus is on a mechanism for general contrastive learning; we do not explore orthogonal factors (such as specific pretext tasks) that may further improve accuracy. As an example, “MoCo v2” [8], an extension of a preliminary version of this manuscript, achieves 71.1% accuracy with R50 (up from 60.6%), given small changes on the data augmentation and output projection head [7]. We believe that this additional result shows the generality and robustness of the MoCo framework.
items.zh: 本文的重点是通用对比学习的机制；我们不探索可能进一步提高准确率的正交因素（例如特定的前置任务）。例如，“MoCo v2” [8]（本文初稿的扩展）在数据增强和输出投影头[7]的小改动下，使用R50达到了71.1%的准确率（从60.6%提升）。我们相信这一额外结果显示了MoCo框架的通用性和鲁棒性。

items.en: A main goal of unsupervised learning is to learn features that are transferrable. ImageNet supervised pre-training is most influential when serving as the initialization for fine-tuning in downstream tasks (e.g., [21, 20, 43, 52]). Next we compare MoCo with ImageNet supervised pre-training, transferred to various tasks including PASCAL VOC [18], COCO [42], etc. As prerequisites, we discuss two important issues involved [31]: normalization and schedules.
items.zh: 无监督学习的一个主要目标是学习可迁移的特征。ImageNet监督预训练在作为下游任务微调的初始化时最具影响力（例如[21, 20, 43, 52]）。接下来，我们将MoCo与ImageNet监督预训练进行比较，迁移到各种任务，包括PASCAL VOC [18]、COCO [42]等。作为前提，我们讨论涉及的两个重要问题[31]：归一化和调度。

items.en: As noted in Sec. 4.1, features produced by unsupervised pre-training can have different distributions compared with ImageNet supervised pre-training. But a system for a downstream task often has hyper-parameters (e.g., learning rates) selected for supervised pre-training. To relieve this problem, we adopt feature normalization during fine-tuning: we fine-tune with BN that is trained (and synchronized across GPUs [49]), instead of freezing it by an affine layer [33]. We also use BN in the newly initialized layers (e.g., FPN [41]), which helps calibrate magnitudes.
items.zh: 如第4.1节所述，无监督预训练产生的特征分布可能与ImageNet监督预训练不同。但下游任务的系统通常具有为监督预训练选择的超参数（例如学习率）。为缓解此问题，我们在微调期间采用特征归一化：我们使用训练过的BN（并在GPU间同步[49]）进行微调，而不是通过仿射层[33]冻结它。我们还在新初始化的层（例如FPN [41]）中使用BN，这有助于校准幅度。

items.en: We perform normalization when fine-tuning supervised and unsupervised pre-training models. MoCo uses the same hyper-parameters as the ImageNet supervised counterpart.
items.zh: 我们在微调监督和无监督预训练模型时进行归一化。MoCo使用与ImageNet监督对应模型相同的超参数。

items.en: If the fine-tuning schedule is long enough, training detectors from random initialization can be strong baselines, and can match the ImageNet supervised counterpart on COCO [31]. Our goal is to investigate transferability of features, so our experiments are on controlled schedules, e.g., the 1×\times (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim12 epochs) or 2×\times schedules [22] for COCO, in contrast to 6×\times∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim9×\times in [31]. On smaller datasets like VOC, training longer may not catch up [31].
items.zh: 如果微调调度足够长，从随机初始化训练检测器可以成为强基线，并且可以在COCO上匹配ImageNet监督对应模型[31]。我们的目标是研究特征的可迁移性，因此我们的实验在受控调度上进行，例如COCO的1倍（约12个epoch）或2倍调度[22]，而[31]中为6倍到9倍。在像VOC这样较小的数据集上，训练更长时间可能无法赶上[31]。

items.en: Nonetheless, in our fine-tuning, MoCo uses the same schedule as the ImageNet supervised counterpart, and random initialization results are provided as references.
items.zh: 尽管如此，在我们的微调中，MoCo使用与ImageNet监督对应模型相同的调度，并提供了随机初始化结果作为参考。

items.en: Put together, our fine-tuning uses the same setting as the supervised pre-training counterpart. This may place MoCo at a disadvantage. Even so, MoCo is competitive. Doing so also makes it feasible to present comparisons on multiple datasets/tasks, without extra hyper-parameter search.
items.zh: 综上所述，我们的微调使用与监督预训练对应模型相同的设置。这可能使MoCo处于不利地位。即便如此，MoCo仍具有竞争力。这样做也使得在多个数据集/任务上进行比较成为可能，而无需额外的超参数搜索。

items.en: The detector is Faster R-CNN [52] with a backbone of R50-dilated-C5 or R50-C4 [32] (details in appendix), with BN tuned, implemented in [60]. We fine-tune all layers end-to-end. The image scale is [480, 800] pixels during training and 800 at inference. The same setup is used for all entries, including the supervised pre-training baseline. We evaluate the default VOC metric of AP5050{}_{\text{50}} (i.e., IoU threshold is 50%) and the more stringent metrics of COCO-style AP and AP7575{}_{\text{75}}. Evaluation is on the VOC test2007 set.
items.zh: 检测器为Faster R-CNN [52]，主干网络采用R50-dilated-C5或R50-C4 [32]（详见附录），BN调优，实现于[60]。我们端到端微调所有层。训练时图像尺度为[480, 800]像素，推理时为800。所有实验（包括监督预训练基线）均采用相同设置。我们评估默认VOC指标AP50（即IoU阈值为50%）以及更严格的COCO风格指标AP和AP75。评估在VOC test2007集上进行。

items.en: Interestingly, the transferring accuracy depends on the detector structure. For the C4 backbone, by default used in existing ResNet-based results [14, 61, 26, 66], the advantage of unsupervised pre-training is larger. The relation between pre-training vs. detector structures has been veiled in the past, and should be a factor under consideration.
items.zh: 有趣的是，迁移精度取决于检测器结构。对于C4主干网络（现有基于ResNet的结果[14, 61, 26, 66]默认使用），无监督预训练的优势更大。预训练与检测器结构之间的关系过去未被揭示，应作为考虑因素。

items.en: We point out that these results are partially because we establish solid detection baselines for contrastive learning. To pin-point the gain that is solely contributed by using the MoCo mechanism in contrastive learning, we fine-tune the models pre-trained with the end-to-end or memory bank mechanism, both implemented by us (i.e., the best ones in Figure 3), using the same fine-tuning setting as MoCo.
items.zh: 我们指出，这些结果部分归因于我们为对比学习建立了坚实的检测基线。为了精确定位仅由MoCo机制在对比学习中贡献的增益，我们使用与MoCo相同的微调设置，微调了由我们实现的端到端或记忆库机制预训练的模型（即图3中最佳模型）。

items.en: These competitors perform decently (Table 3). Their AP and AP7575{}_{\text{75}} with the C4 backbone are also higher than the ImageNet supervised counterpart’s, c.f. Table 2b, but other metrics are lower. They are worse than MoCo in all metrics. This shows the benefits of MoCo. In addition, how to train these competitors in larger-scale data is an open question, and they may not benefit from IG-1B.
items.zh: 这些竞争方法表现尚可（表3）。它们在C4主干网络下的AP和AP75也高于ImageNet监督对应方法（见表2b），但其他指标较低。在所有指标上它们均不如MoCo。这显示了MoCo的优势。此外，如何在大规模数据上训练这些竞争方法仍是一个开放问题，它们可能无法从IG-1B中获益。

items.en: Following the competitors, we fine-tune on trainval2007 (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim5k images) using the C4 backbone. The comparison is in Table 4.
items.zh: 遵循竞争方法，我们使用C4主干网络在trainval2007（约5k图像）上进行微调。比较结果见表4。

items.en: For the AP5050{}_{\text{50}} metric, no previous method can catch up with its respective supervised pre-training counterpart. MoCo pre-trained on any of IN-1M, IN-14M (full ImageNet), YFCC-100M [55], and IG-1B can outperform the supervised baseline. Large gains are seen in the more stringent metrics: up to +5.2 AP and +9.0 AP7575{}_{\text{75}}. These gains are larger than the gains seen in trainval07+12 (Table 2b).
items.zh: 对于AP50指标，之前的方法均无法赶上其对应的监督预训练基线。在IN-1M、IN-14M（完整ImageNet）、YFCC-100M [55]和IG-1B上预训练的MoCo均可超越监督基线。在更严格的指标上观察到较大增益：AP提升高达+5.2，AP75提升高达+9.0。这些增益大于在trainval07+12上观察到的增益（表2b）。

items.en: The model is Mask R-CNN [32] with the FPN [41] or C4 backbone, with BN tuned, implemented in [60]. The image scale is in [640, 800] pixels during training and is 800 at inference. We fine-tune all layers end-to-end. We fine-tune on the train2017 set (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim118k images) and evaluate on val2017. The schedule is the default 1×\times or 2×\times in [22].
items.zh: 模型为Mask R-CNN [32]，采用FPN [41]或C4主干网络，BN调优，实现于[60]。训练时图像尺度为[640, 800]像素，推理时为800。我们端到端微调所有层。在train2017集（约118k图像）上微调，在val2017上评估。调度为[22]中的默认1×或2×。

items.en: COCO keypoint detection: supervised pre-training has no clear advantage over random initialization, whereas MoCo outperforms in all metrics.
items.zh: COCO关键点检测：监督预训练相比随机初始化无明显优势，而MoCo在所有指标上均表现更优。

items.en: COCO dense pose estimation [1]: MoCo substantially outperforms supervised pre-training, e.g., by 3.7 points in AP75dpsubscriptsuperscriptabsentdp75{}^{\text{dp}}_{\text{75}}, in this highly localization-sensitive task.
items.zh: COCO密集姿态估计[1]：MoCo显著优于监督预训练，例如在这个高度定位敏感的任务中，AP75dp提升了3.7个点。

items.en: LVIS v0.5 instance segmentation [27]: this task has ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim1000 long-tailed distributed categories. Specifically in LVIS for the ImageNet supervised baseline, we find fine-tuning with frozen BN (24.4 APmksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{}}) is better than tunable BN (details in appendix). So we compare MoCo with the better supervised pre-training variant in this task. MoCo with IG-1B surpasses it in all metrics.
items.zh: LVIS v0.5实例分割[27]：该任务包含约1000个长尾分布类别。具体在LVIS中，对于ImageNet监督基线，我们发现使用冻结BN微调（24.4 APmk）优于可调BN（详见附录）。因此我们在此任务中将MoCo与更好的监督预训练变体进行比较。使用IG-1B的MoCo在所有指标上均超越它。

items.en: Cityscapes instance segmentation [10]: MoCo with IG-1B is on par with its supervised pre-training counterpart in APmksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{}}, and is higher in AP50mksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk50{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{50}}.
items.zh: Cityscapes实例分割[10]：使用IG-1B的MoCo在APmk上与监督预训练对应方法持平，在AP50mk上更高。

items.en: Semantic segmentation: On Cityscapes [10], MoCo outperforms its supervised pre-training counterpart by up to 0.9 point. But on VOC semantic segmentation, MoCo is worse by at least 0.8 point, a negative case we have observed.
items.zh: 语义分割：在Cityscapes [10]上，MoCo比监督预训练对应方法高出最多0.9个点。但在VOC语义分割上，MoCo至少低0.8个点，这是我们观察到的负面案例。

items.en: In sum, MoCo can outperform its ImageNet supervised pre-training counterpart in 7 detection or segmentation tasks.555Namely, object detection on VOC/COCO, instance segmentation on COCO/LVIS, keypoint detection on COCO, dense pose on COCO, and semantic segmentation on Cityscapes. Besides, MoCo is on par on Cityscapes instance segmentation, and lags behind on VOC semantic segmentation; we show another comparable case on iNaturalist [57] in appendix. Overall, MoCo has largely closed the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning in multiple vision tasks.
items.zh: 总之，MoCo在7个检测或分割任务上可以超越其ImageNet监督预训练对应方法。5即VOC/COCO上的目标检测、COCO/LVIS上的实例分割、COCO上的关键点检测、COCO上的密集姿态估计以及Cityscapes上的语义分割。此外，MoCo在Cityscapes实例分割上持平，在VOC语义分割上落后；我们在附录中展示了另一个可比较的iNaturalist [57]案例。总体而言，MoCo在多个视觉任务中大幅缩小了无监督与监督表示学习之间的差距。

items.en: Remarkably, in all these tasks, MoCo pre-trained on IG-1B is consistently better than MoCo pre-trained on IN-1M. This shows that MoCo can perform well on this large-scale, relatively uncurated dataset. This represents a scenario towards real-world unsupervised learning.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，在所有任务中，使用IG-1B预训练的MoCo始终优于使用IN-1M预训练的MoCo。这表明MoCo在这个大规模、相对未整理的数据集上表现良好。这代表了向真实世界无监督学习迈进的一个场景。

items.en: Our method has shown positive results of unsupervised learning in a variety of computer vision tasks and datasets. A few open questions are worth discussing. MoCo’s improvement from IN-1M to IG-1B is consistently noticeable but relatively small, suggesting that the larger-scale data may not be fully exploited. We hope an advanced pretext task will improve this. Beyond the simple instance discrimination task [61], it is possible to adopt MoCo for pretext tasks like masked auto-encoding, e.g., in language [12] and in vision [46]. We hope MoCo will be useful with other pretext tasks that involve contrastive learning.
items.zh: 我们的方法在多种计算机视觉任务和数据集上展示了无监督学习的积极结果。有几个开放问题值得讨论。MoCo从IN-1M到IG-1B的改进虽然持续可见但相对较小，表明更大规模的数据可能未被充分利用。我们希望更先进的前置任务能改善这一点。除了简单的实例判别任务[61]，还可以将MoCo用于掩码自编码等前置任务，例如在语言[12]和视觉[46]中。我们希望MoCo能与其他涉及对比学习的前置任务一起发挥作用。

full.secZh: A.1 实现：目标检测骨干网络

items.en: The R50-dilated-C5 and R50-C4 backbones are similar to those available in Detectron2 [60]: (i) R50-dilated-C5: the backbone includes the ResNet conv55{}_{\text{5}} stage with a dilation of 2 and stride 1, followed by a 3×\times3 convolution (with BN) that reduces dimension to 512. The box prediction head consists of two hidden fully-connected layers. (ii) R50-C4: the backbone ends with the conv44{}_{\text{4}} stage, and the box prediction head consists of the conv55{}_{\text{5}} stage (including global pooling) followed by a BN layer.
items.zh: R50-dilated-C5和R50-C4主干网络类似于Detectron2 [60]中可用的版本：(i) R50-dilated-C5：主干网络包括ResNet conv5阶段，膨胀率为2，步长为1，后接一个3×3卷积（带BN），将维度降至512。框预测头包含两个隐藏全连接层。(ii) R50-C4：主干网络以conv4阶段结束，框预测头包括conv5阶段（含全局池化）后接一个BN层。

items.en: We use Mask R-CNN (keypoint version) with R50-FPN, implemented in [60], fine-tuned on COCO train2017 and evaluated on val2017. The schedule is 2×\times.
items.zh: 我们使用Mask R-CNN（关键点版本）和R50-FPN，实现于[60]，在COCO train2017上微调，在val2017上评估。调度为2×。

full.sec: A.3 Implementation: COCO dense pose estimation
full.secZh: A.3 实现：COCO密集姿态估计

items.en: We use DensePose R-CNN [1] with R50-FPN, implemented in [60], fine-tuned on COCO train2017 and evaluated on val2017. The schedule is “s1×\times”.
items.zh: 我们使用DensePose R-CNN [1]和R50-FPN，实现于[60]，在COCO train2017上微调，在val2017上评估。调度为“s1×”。

items.en: We use Mask R-CNN with R50-FPN, fine-tuned in LVIS [27] train_v0.5 and evaluated in val_v0.5. We follow the baseline in [27] (arXiv v3 Appendix B).
items.zh: 我们使用Mask R-CNN和R50-FPN，在LVIS [27] train_v0.5上微调，在val_v0.5上评估。我们遵循[27]中的基线（arXiv v3附录B）。

items.en: LVIS is a new dataset and model designs on it are to be explored. The following table includes the relevant ablations (all are averages of 5 trials):
items.zh: LVIS是一个新数据集，其上的模型设计有待探索。下表包含相关消融实验（均为5次试验的平均值）：

items.en: A supervised pre-training baseline, end-to-end tuned but with BN frozen, has 24.4 APmksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{}}. But tuning BN in this baseline leads to worse results and overfitting (this is unlike on COCO/VOC where tuning BN gives better or comparable accuracy). MoCo has 24.1 APmksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{}} with IN-1M and 24.9 APmksubscriptsuperscriptabsentmk{}^{\text{mk}}_{\text{}} with IG-1B, both outperforming the supervised pre-training counterpart under the same tunable BN setting. Under the best individual settings, MoCo can still outperform the supervised pre-training case (24.9 vs. 24.4, as reported in Table 6 in Sec 4.2).
items.zh: 一个监督预训练基线，端到端调优但BN冻结，APmk为24.4。但在此基线中调优BN会导致更差的结果和过拟合（这与COCO/VOC上调优BN能获得更好或相当精度的情况不同）。MoCo在IN-1M上APmk为24.1，在IG-1B上APmk为24.9，两者在相同的可调BN设置下均优于监督预训练对应项。在最佳个体设置下，MoCo仍能优于监督预训练情况（24.9 vs. 24.4，如第4.2节表6所示）。

items.en: We use an FCN-based [43] structure. The backbone consists of the convolutional layers in R50, and the 3×\times3 convolutions in conv5 blocks have dilation 2 and stride 1. This is followed by two extra 3×\times3 convolutions of 256 channels, with BN and ReLU, and then a 1×\times1 convolution for per-pixel classification. The total stride is 16 (FCN-16s [43]). We set dilation == 6 in the two extra 3×\times3 convolutions, following the large field-of-view design in [6].
items.zh: 我们采用基于FCN [43]的结构。骨干网络由R50中的卷积层组成，conv5块中的3×3卷积具有膨胀率2和步长1。其后是两个额外的256通道3×3卷积，带有BN和ReLU，然后是一个1×1卷积用于逐像素分类。总步长为16（FCN-16s [43]）。我们在两个额外的3×3卷积中设置膨胀率=6，遵循[6]中的大视野设计。

items.en: Training is with random scaling (by a ratio in [0.5, 2.0]), cropping, and horizontal flipping. The crop size is 513 on VOC and 769 on Cityscapes [6]. Inference is performed on the original image size. We train with mini-batch size 16 and weight decay 0.0001. Learning rate is 0.003 on VOC and is 0.01 on Cityscapes (multiplied by 0.1 at 70-th and 90-th percentile of training). For VOC, we train on the train_aug2012 set (augmented by [30], 10582 images) for 30k iterations, and evaluate on val2012. For Cityscapes, we train on the train_fine set (2975 images) for 90k iterations, and evaluate on the val set. Results are reported as averages over 5 trials.
items.zh: 训练采用随机缩放（比例在[0.5, 2.0]范围内）、裁剪和水平翻转。裁剪尺寸在VOC上为513，在Cityscapes上为769 [6]。推理在原始图像尺寸上进行。我们使用小批量大小16和权重衰减0.0001进行训练。学习率在VOC上为0.003，在Cityscapes上为0.01（在训练的70%和90%处乘以0.1）。对于VOC，我们在train_aug2012集（由[30]扩充，10582张图像）上训练30k次迭代，并在val2012上评估。对于Cityscapes，我们在train_fine集（2975张图像）上训练90k次迭代，并在val集上评估。结果报告为5次试验的平均值。

items.en: In addition to the detection/segmentation experiments in the main paper, we study fine-grained classification on the iNaturalist 2018 dataset [57]. We fine-tune the pre-trained models end-to-end on the train set (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim437k images, 8142 classes) and evaluate on the val set. Training follows the typical ResNet implementation in PyTorch with 100 epochs. Fine-tuning has a learning rate of 0.025 (vs. 0.1 from scratch) decreased by 10 at the 70-th and 90-th percentile of training. The following is the R50 result:
items.zh: 除了主论文中的检测/分割实验外，我们还在iNaturalist 2018数据集[57]上研究了细粒度分类。我们在训练集（约437k张图像，8142个类别）上端到端微调预训练模型，并在验证集上评估。训练遵循PyTorch中典型的ResNet实现，共100个epoch。微调的学习率为0.025（相对于从头训练的0.1），在训练的70%和90%处降低10倍。以下是R50的结果：

items.en: MoCo is ∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim4% better than training from random initialization, and is closely comparable with its ImageNet supervised counterpart. This again shows that MoCo unsupervised pre-training is competitive.
items.zh: MoCo比从随机初始化训练好约4%，并且与其ImageNet监督对应项相当。这再次表明MoCo无监督预训练具有竞争力。

items.en: Linear classification on frozen features (Sec. 4.1) is a common protocol of evaluating unsupervised pre-training methods. However, in practice, it is more common to fine-tune the features end-to-end in a downstream task. For completeness, the following table reports end-to-end fine-tuning results for the 1000-class ImageNet classification, compared with training from scratch (fine-tuning uses an initial learning rate of 0.03, vs. 0.1 from scratch):
items.zh: 冻结特征上的线性分类（第4.1节）是评估无监督预训练方法的常见协议。然而，在实践中，更常见的是在下游任务中端到端微调特征。为完整起见，下表报告了1000类ImageNet分类的端到端微调结果，并与从头训练进行比较（微调使用初始学习率0.03，而从头训练为0.1）：

items.en: As here ImageNet is the downstream task, the case of MoCo pre-trained on IN-1M does not represent a real scenario (for reference, we report that its accuracy is 77.0% after fine-tuning). But unsupervised pre-training in the separate, unlabeled dataset of IG-1B represents a typical scenario: in this case, MoCo improves by 0.8%.
items.zh: 由于此处ImageNet是下游任务，MoCo在IN-1M上预训练的情况并不代表真实场景（作为参考，我们报告其微调后准确率为77.0%）。但在独立的未标记数据集IG-1B上进行无监督预训练代表了一个典型场景：在这种情况下，MoCo提升了0.8%。

items.en: In Table 5 we reported results of the 1×\times (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim12 epochs) and 2×\times schedules on COCO. These schedules were inherited from the original Mask R-CNN paper [32], which could be suboptimal given later advance in the field. In Table A.1, we supplement the results of a 6×\times schedule (∼similar-to\scriptstyle\sim72 epochs) [31] and compare with those of the 2×\times schedule.
items.zh: 在表5中，我们报告了COCO上1×（约12个epoch）和2×计划的结果。这些计划继承自原始Mask R-CNN论文[32]，鉴于该领域的后续进展，可能不是最优的。在表A.1中，我们补充了6×计划（约72个epoch）[31]的结果，并与2×计划的结果进行比较。

items.en: We observe: (i) fine-tuning with ImageNet-supervised pre-training still has improvements (41.9 APbbsubscriptsuperscriptabsentbb{}^{\text{bb}}_{\text{}}); (ii) training from scratch largely catches up (41.4 APbbsubscriptsuperscriptabsentbb{}^{\text{bb}}_{\text{}}); (iii) the MoCo counterparts improve further (e.g., to 42.8 APbbsubscriptsuperscriptabsentbb{}^{\text{bb}}_{\text{}}) and have larger gaps (e.g., +0.9 APbbsubscriptsuperscriptabsentbb{}^{\text{bb}}_{\text{}} with 6×\times, vs. +0.5 APbbsubscriptsuperscriptabsentbb{}^{\text{bb}}_{\text{}} with 2×\times). Table A.1 and Table 5 suggest that the MoCo pre-trained features can have larger advantages than the ImageNet-supervised features when fine-tuning longer.
items.zh: 我们观察到：（i）使用ImageNet监督预训练进行微调仍有改进（APbb为41.9）；（ii）从头训练基本赶上（APbb为41.4）；（iii）MoCo对应项进一步改进（例如，APbb达到42.8），且差距更大（例如，6×时+0.9 APbb，而2×时+0.5 APbb）。表A.1和表5表明，当微调时间更长时，MoCo预训练特征可能比ImageNet监督特征具有更大的优势。

items.en: These experiments suggest that without shuffling BN, the sub-batch statistics can serve as a “signature” to tell which sub-batch the positive key is in. Shuffling BN can remove this signature and avoid such cheating.
items.zh: 这些实验表明，如果不打乱BN，子批次统计信息可以作为“签名”来指示正键所在的子批次。打乱BN可以去除这种签名并避免此类作弊。

items.capEn: Figure A.1: Ablation of Shuffling BN. Dash: training curve of the pretext task, plotted as the accuracy of (K𝐾K+1)-way dictionary lookup. Solid: validation curve of a kNN-based monitor [61] (not a linear classifier) on ImageNet classification accuracy. This plot shows the first 80 epochs of training: training longer without shuffling BN overfits more.
items.capZh: 图A.1：打乱BN的消融实验。虚线： pretext任务的训练曲线，绘制为(K+1)路字典查找的准确率。实线：基于kNN的监视器[61]（非线性分类器）在ImageNet分类准确率上的验证曲线。该图显示了前80个epoch的训练：不打乱BN训练更长时间会导致更严重的过拟合。
